testsuite.name: Computhink.Script.Templates_Test

testcase.name: Login_EWA
testcase.system-out: EWA URL launched successfull Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: Dipak Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. User has logged in successfully.

testcase.name: TC_01_verify_to_CreateorBrowse_Template_Defaultviewing
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 1 :Verifying to Create or Browse Template Default Viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Refresh button Click on Setting Icon Click on My preferences option Select Office Document and set Default View Option Select Pdf Document and set Default View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button Template tab is displayed successfully. Click on Template Tab Document Template permission is Denied for Selected User need to assign Document Template permission Click on Username option Click on Logout option Timeout waiting for alert to appear. Scenario 01: Log into EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: admin Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session for user is already active. Do you want to create a new session? Dialog box displayed. User clicks OK button. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Click on Setting Icon Click on Document Template Click on User List dropdown Select all Users from Dropdown Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Username option Click on Logout option Timeout waiting for alert to appear. Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: Dipak Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer select a Folder Click on Ok button Browse Document page By using AutoIT add file from external folder Select Value from Document type Dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document page Click on Save Template button Save Template button clicked successfully Click on Template Description dialog No button Click again on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter value into Template Name field Click on Template Description Textbox Enter Template Description message Click on Template Description Yes button Verifying Template Created succesfully Message Click on Ok button Verifying to CreateorBrowse Template Defaultviewing

testcase.name: TC_02_Verify_to_Edit_and_Delete_DefaultTemplate
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 2: Verifying to Edit and Delete Default Template Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template Page Created Template page open successfully Click on Edit Template Fab Option Click on Edit Template Description Textbox Enter Message under Description Box Click on Edit Template Dialog Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Template Edited Succesfully Ok button Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template Page Click on Delete Template Fab Option Click on Delete Template Dialog Ok button Template Deleted Successfully

testcase.name: TC_03_verify_to_CreateorBrowse_Template_Advancedviewing_Officedoc
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 3: Verifying to Create or Browse Template In Advanced Viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Office Document and set Advanced View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button Click on Template Tab Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer selecta Folder Click on Ok button of Browse for folder Dialog Select Value from Document Type Dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document page By using AutoIT add file from external folder Click on Save Template button Click on Template Description Dialog No button Click again on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter Name under Template Name Textbox Click on Template Description Messagebox Enter Template Description Message Under Description box Click on Template Description box Ok button Verifying Template created successfully Message Click on Template Created Ok button Verifying to CreateorBrowse Officedoc Template advancedviewing

testcase.name: TC_04_Verify_to_Edit_and_Delete_AdvancedTemplate_Officedoc
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 4: Verifying to Edit and Delete Advanced View Officedocument Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Edit Template Fab button Click on Edit Template Description Messagebox Enter Message under Edit Template Description Messagebox Click on Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Template Edited successfully dialog Ok button Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Delete Template Fab button Template Deleted Successfully

testcase.name: TC_05_verify_to_Create_Formmapping_PDFTemplate_Advancedviewing
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 5: Verifying to Create Form mapping in Advanced viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Pdf Document and set Advanced view Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Template Tab Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer Folder is selected for Templates Click on Ok button Select value from Document type dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document Page Enter Pdf file Name Click on PdfViewer menu option Select and Add Textbox on Page Click on Form mapping Option Select Form field Click on Ok button Click on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter value into Template Name field Click on Template Description Messagebox Enter Description Message into Description field Click on Ok button Template Created Successfully Verifying to CreateorBrowse Formmapping Template advancedviewing

testcase.name: TC_06_Verify_to_Edit_and_Delete_Formfield
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 6: Verifying to Edit and Delete Form field Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Template Tab Select Created Template Document page Click on Edit Template Fab button Clik on Edit Template Description Messagebox Enter Description Message into Description field Click on Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Ok button Click on Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Delete Template Fab button Formmapping Template Deleted Successfully

testcase.name: TC_07_Set_Defaultview
testcase.system-out: Test Scenario 7: Set Office and Pdf document option in Default view Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Office Documentand set Default View Option Select PdfDocument and set Default View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button

testsuite.system-out: EWA URL launched successfull Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: Dipak Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. User has logged in successfully. Test Scenario 1 :Verifying to Create or Browse Template Default Viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Refresh button Click on Setting Icon Click on My preferences option Select Office Document and set Default View Option Select Pdf Document and set Default View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button Template tab is displayed successfully. Click on Template Tab Document Template permission is Denied for Selected User need to assign Document Template permission Click on Username option Click on Logout option Timeout waiting for alert to appear. Scenario 01: Log into EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: admin Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session for user is already active. Do you want to create a new session? Dialog box displayed. User clicks OK button. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Click on Setting Icon Click on Document Template Click on User List dropdown Select all Users from Dropdown Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Username option Click on Logout option Timeout waiting for alert to appear. Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: Dipak Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: Win2025_Server.CV2026_Win2025_Demo Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer select a Folder Click on Ok button Browse Document page By using AutoIT add file from external folder Select Value from Document type Dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document page Click on Save Template button Save Template button clicked successfully Click on Template Description dialog No button Click again on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter value into Template Name field Click on Template Description Textbox Enter Template Description message Click on Template Description Yes button Verifying Template Created succesfully Message Click on Ok button Verifying to CreateorBrowse Template Defaultviewing Test Scenario 2: Verifying to Edit and Delete Default Template Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template Page Created Template page open successfully Click on Edit Template Fab Option Click on Edit Template Description Textbox Enter Message under Description Box Click on Edit Template Dialog Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Template Edited Succesfully Ok button Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template Page Click on Delete Template Fab Option Click on Delete Template Dialog Ok button Template Deleted Successfully Test Scenario 3: Verifying to Create or Browse Template In Advanced Viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Office Document and set Advanced View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button Click on Template Tab Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer selecta Folder Click on Ok button of Browse for folder Dialog Select Value from Document Type Dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document page By using AutoIT add file from external folder Click on Save Template button Click on Template Description Dialog No button Click again on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter Name under Template Name Textbox Click on Template Description Messagebox Enter Template Description Message Under Description box Click on Template Description box Ok button Verifying Template created successfully Message Click on Template Created Ok button Verifying to CreateorBrowse Officedoc Template advancedviewing Test Scenario 4: Verifying to Edit and Delete Advanced View Officedocument Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Edit Template Fab button Click on Edit Template Description Messagebox Enter Message under Edit Template Description Messagebox Click on Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Template Edited successfully dialog Ok button Mousehover to Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Delete Template Fab button Template Deleted Successfully Test Scenario 5: Verifying to Create Form mapping in Advanced viewing Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Pdf Document and set Advanced view Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Template Tab Click on Destination Folder Textbox Expand a Cabinet Expand a Drawer Folder is selected for Templates Click on Ok button Select value from Document type dropdown Enter value into Report Name field Browse Document Page Enter Pdf file Name Click on PdfViewer menu option Select and Add Textbox on Page Click on Form mapping Option Select Form field Click on Ok button Click on Save Template button Click on Template Name Textbox Enter value into Template Name field Click on Template Description Messagebox Enter Description Message into Description field Click on Ok button Template Created Successfully Verifying to CreateorBrowse Formmapping Template advancedviewing Test Scenario 6: Verifying to Edit and Delete Form field Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Template Tab Select Created Template Document page Click on Edit Template Fab button Clik on Edit Template Description Messagebox Enter Description Message into Description field Click on Ok button Template edited successfully Click on Ok button Click on Template Tab Select Created Template page Click on Delete Template Fab button Formmapping Template Deleted Successfully Test Scenario 7: Set Office and Pdf document option in Default view Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field Click on Setting Icon Click on My Preferences Option Select Office Documentand set Default View Option Select PdfDocument and set Default View Option Click on Apply button Saved Successfully! this toast message should show Click on Refresh button
